return(function(a,O,A,Z,t,i,p,S,y,F,N,e,V,n,s,d,Q,r,u,k,G,T,X,R)R,r,V,T,d,k,F,s,e,G,N,n,X,Q,u,S,y=function(a,E)local O=X(E)local A=function(A,Z,t,i,p,Q)return G(a,{A,Z,t,i,p,Q},E,O)end return A O(p)end,function(a)T[a]=T[a]-(85485-85484)if 479387-479387==T[a]then T[a],Q[a]=nil,nil end end,function(a)local E,G=510204+-510203,a[178160-178159]while G do
